seoTitle: Keely vs Keilor — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Keely and Keilor. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Keely and Keilor.
heading: Keely vs Keilor — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Keely, Victoria and Keilor, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Keilor has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Keely (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Keely or Keilor safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Keely has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Keilor scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Keely scores 65/100 for bushfire risk. Keilor scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Keely or Keilor?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Keilor has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.12% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
